description_long: This sculpture depicts three life-sized human figures standing together on a rectangular stone pedestal. The central figure wears a helmet and a long coat, suggesting a military or protective role, while the two flanking figures are dressed in civilian attire, one with an outstretched arm and the other with a hand on the central figure's shoulder. The figures are rendered in a realistic style, with detailed facial features and clothing folds. The base of the sculpture is inscribed with text listing several country names and dates, indicating a commemorative or memorial purpose. The entire piece is set on a paved stone platform with patches of grass around the edges. The surface of the sculpture appears weathered, with a rough, matte stone finish.
description: A realistic stone sculpture of three human figures, one in military attire and two civilians, standing together on a rectangular pedestal with inscribed text. The piece is set on a paved platform with some grass around the base.
description_view_0: The front view shows all three figures clearly, with the central helmeted figure flanked by two civilians, and the inscribed pedestal base visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the profile of the figures, especially the civilian on the left, and shows the thickness of the sculpture and the paved base.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the backs of the figures, emphasizing the broad back of the central figure and the solid, unadorned rear of the pedestal.
description_view_3: This angled side view shows the figures from the opposite side, focusing on the civilian on the right and the overall depth of the sculpture.
attribute_subject_matter: three human figures, one in military attire and two civilians, commemorative memorial
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a paved stone platform with grass edging, suggesting a public park or plaza setting.
